observations.label: image_quality
observations.value: good overall but slightly dim and cluttered; most room surfaces visible

observations.label: visible_elements
observations.value: interior room with low ceiling, wood plank flooring, painted white walls and ceiling, exposed stone wall at back and right side, central structural column, surface-mounted track lighting on ceiling, freestanding refrigerator or tall appliance, countertop/work surface on right, cabinet/wardrobe at back right, clothes rack, miscellaneous furniture and stored items

observations.label: unclear_regions
observations.value: left foreground partially blocked by furniture and bottles, right countertop area clutter obscures lower cabinets and wall details, ceiling-left edge detail unclear near conduit/patch area, exact condition and finish of floor partially obscured by perspective and furniture
observations.notes: Regions the model could not inspect confidently.

observations.label: room_type
observations.notes: Space appears occupied and in use, not an active construction site.

observations.label: ceiling_height
observations.notes: Ceiling appears notably low across the room.

observations.label: floor_finish
observations.notes: Continuous planks visible through the room.

observations.label: wall_finish_mixed
observations.notes: Combination of smooth painted surfaces and exposed stone masonry.

observations.label: exposed_stone_wall_present
observations.notes: Back and right walls show exposed stone.

observations.label: structural_column_present
observations.notes: Rectangular painted column near center of room.

observations.label: ceiling_track_lighting_present
observations.notes: Several spotlights mounted on track or surface rail.

observations.label: visible_ceiling_or_wall_irregularity_left
observations.notes: At left ceiling/wall junction there appears to be a patch, conduit, or surface irregularity.

observations.label: space_cluttered
observations.notes: Furniture, appliances, bottles, clothing rack, and countertop items obstruct access and full inspection.

observations.label: pricing_risk_access_constraints
observations.notes: Occupied and cluttered room may require clearing/protection before work.

observations.label: pricing_risk_hidden_conditions
observations.notes: Stored items and finishes conceal portions of walls, floor edges, and service routes.

name.value: inspect existing ceiling track lighting installation

point_a.value: ceiling lighting track spanning central to right side

point_b.value: individual spotlight heads and mounting points

name.value: inspect and assess left wall/ceiling junction irregularity or patch

point_b.value: left ceiling edge near visible protrusion/repair area

clarifying_questions.question: Is work intended in this occupied room, or is this only an existing-condition survey?
clarifying_questions.reason: The image shows a furnished, actively used space rather than clear ongoing renovation; scope cannot be inferred from visible evidence alone.

clarifying_questions.question: What is the condition and purpose of the visible irregularity/patch at the upper left wall-ceiling junction?
clarifying_questions.reason: Could indicate prior repair, exposed conduit, crack, or moisture-related damage, which materially affects scope and pricing.

clarifying_questions.question: Will the room be fully cleared and protected before any work starts?
clarifying_questions.reason: Furniture, appliances, bottles, and countertop items create access constraints and potential handling/protection costs.

clarifying_questions.question: Are any upgrades or modifications planned for the ceiling lighting and electrical routing?
clarifying_questions.reason: Track lighting is visible, but adequacy, code status, and desired changes are unknown.

clarifying_questions.question: Are the exposed stone walls to remain visible, be cleaned/repointed, or be covered/finished?
clarifying_questions.reason: Mixed wall finishes affect finishing scope and treatment methods.
